parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ org_id: $("Webhook Trigger").first().json.body.org_id, grant_id: $("Webhook Trigger").first().json.body.grantId || $("Webhook Trigger").first().json.body.grant_id, type: "grant_not_eligible", title: "Grant \"" + ($("Webhook Trigger").first().json.body.grantData?.title || $("Webhook Trigger").first().json.body.grant_name || "Unknown") + "\" is not eligible", message: $json.rejectionReason || "Grant did not pass eligibility screening (RED score)" }) }}

nodes.name: Use Scanner Data
nodes.notes: Use pre-extracted data from Grant Scanner

values.content:
You are a grant eligibility analyst. You evaluate grant opportunities against a specific nonprofit organization’s profile and programs.

## ORGANIZATION PROFILE & PROGRAMS:
{{ $json.narrativeText }}

---

Using the organization’s narratives above as your sole matching criteria, evaluate how strongly this grant aligns with the organization’s mission, target populations, services, and programs.

**SCORING RULES**
Calculate a Confidence Score (0–100). The closer the grant aligns with the specific populations served, services delivered, and language used in the narratives, the higher the score.

GREEN: Confidence Score above 80
YELLOW: Confidence Score between 50 and 80
RED: Confidence Score below 50

**RETURN VALID JSON:**
{
  "grantid": "the unique grantid of the grant",
  "org_id": "the unique orgid of the grant",
  "overallScore": "GREEN" | "YELLOW" | "RED",
  "confidence": 0-100,
  "summary": "2-sentence eligibility determination referencing specific org programs that match",
  "matchedCategory": "Core Program Grants" | "Program Development & Capacity" | "None",
  "grantTitle": "Extracted grant title",
  "agency": "Funding agency name",
  "deadline": "extract deadline from grant content; if no date, preserve original text like ‘Ongoing’",
  "fundingRange": "$X - $Y",
  "categories": {
    "category1Match": true/false,
    "category2Match": true/false,
    "matchedKeywords": ["keyword1", "keyword2"]
  },
  "keyRequirements": ["501c3 letter", "budget", "etc"],
  "concerns": ["Any red flags"],
  "recommendations": ["Next steps"]
}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, message: "Screening phase for grant: '" + $json.grant_name + "' is completed" }) }}
